creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update lang/basic256 to 0.9.9.38. This is a minor release

Fix: Apply the attached patch.

Notice however that I sent a patch to update to 0.9.9.28[1] and before that was committed I submitted a followup with a patch to update to 0.9.9.32. That last one was _not_ committed, therefore this one applies to the current version in the ports (0.9.9.28)

Best regards.


[1] http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=175115

Patch attached with submission follows:
